mnemonics.title: Default Methods Made Easy
mnemonics.content: DREAM - Default methods Render Existing interfaces Adaptable and Maintainable

mnemonics.title: Interface Methods Simplified
mnemonics.content: IMPS - Interfaces can have Methods with implementation, Parameters, and State (optional)

mnemonics.title: Resolving Conflicts Easily
mnemonics.content: RICE - Resolve Interface Conflicts Easily by overriding default methods
